sessionName: Hypertrophy B (logged) — long run PUNTED to Sun (Achilles AM-sore, cleared pre-lift)

flags: Keep the long genuinely easy — Fri ran 8:59/mi @ HR 171 (not truly easy); the Wed→Fri tighter spacing (Adj #92) + v4.3 reshape raise the intensity fraction, so dial this back to 9:45–10:45/mi (Adj #96).
